TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang kahkahoe'an ga niya mki sku Byori Keng atu Sitan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 59 buwan, 146 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 71% kyan ku 104 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 29% kyan ku 42 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, saySiyat 67%, Tayan 3%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na kahkahoe'an hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na kahkahoe'an hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na kahkahoe'an hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na kahkahoe'an hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'llaw na kahkahoe'an hya' ga tamayo'an. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ kaħkaħoeʔan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku βjori keŋ atu s~ɕitan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, s~ɕajs~ɕijat **%, tajan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na kaħkaħoeʔan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na kaħkaħoeʔan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na kaħkaħoeʔan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na kaħkaħoeʔan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔllaw na kaħkaħoeʔan ħjaʔ ɣa tamajoʔan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang kahkahoe'an ga niya mki sku Byori Keng atu Sitan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 59 buwan, 146 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 71% kyan ku 104 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 29% kyan ku 42 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, saySiyat 67%, Tayan 3%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na kahkahoe'an hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na kahkahoe'an hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na kahkahoe'an hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na kahkahoe'an hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'llaw na kahkahoe'an hya' ga tamayo'an. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ kaħkaħoeʔan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku βjori keŋ atu s~ɕitan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, s~ɕajs~ɕijat **%, tajan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na kaħkaħoeʔan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na kaħkaħoeʔan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na kaħkaħoeʔan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na kaħkaħoeʔan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔllaw na kaħkaħoeʔan ħjaʔ ɣa tamajoʔan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
